## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss client offboarding for Vappy and address team changes at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Vappy contract ended; offboarding process to be completed by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Matt no longer working on Good Call project; focusing on Strategy Sprint](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [Juergen resigned from GrowthX, citing a new position with better time zone alignment](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [PSEO Airtable access for Vappy to be revoked immediately, other access by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)

## Topics

### Vappy Offboarding Process

  - [Contract ended Monday (3 months total engagement)](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [No extension needed; client hasn't proactively requested anything](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Delivered on contract specifications: 300 published articles (100/month)](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Over-delivered on editorial, met custom agent quota](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Action: Matt to inform client of access removal by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Provide export instructions for Editorial Airtable and Notion](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [No mention of programmatic pages in communication](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)

### Airtable and Access Management

  - [Editorial Airtable not built to best practices due to triage situation](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Not a concern as clients typically use it as a repository, not presentation](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [PSEO Airtable access to be revoked immediately](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Other access (Notion, Airtable) to be removed by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [If client notices PSEO access removal, team can claim it was accidental](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)

### Project Reassignments

  - [Matt no longer working on Good Call project](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Focusing on Strategy Sprint, which is currently very demanding](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Darrell remains Matt's escalation point for issues](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Team Changes at GrowthX

  - [Juergen resigned, citing a new position with better time zone alignment](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Positive remarks about Matt in Juergen's resignation letter](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [Reflection on improvements in onboarding process since March/April](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)

### Good Call Project Status

  - [Currently in non-payment state (4 months in arrears)](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Potential pause on all work due to payment issues](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matt to send Vappy offboarding message, mentioning Friday deadline for exports](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [Revoke PSEO Airtable access for Vappy immediately](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Remove Vappy's access to Notion and Airtable by end of day Friday](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Darrell to remove Matt from Geekbot for his pod](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Darrell to potentially schedule a casual post-engagement chat with Vappy for data collection](https://fathom.video/share/cLx6d2KdF_QRwHYN2b-wkDwSYTZrAoMs?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
